name: Ramesh Babu
manifesto_summary: Focuses on agricultural reform, rural infrastructure development, and farmer loan waivers. Promises to increase minimum support prices and build cold storage facilities across the constituency.

name: Lakshmi Devi
manifesto_summary: Emphasizes environmental protection, renewable energy adoption, and sustainable development. Plans to create green jobs and establish solar power cooperatives in every village.

name: Suresh Yadav
manifesto_summary: Champions workers' rights, minimum wage increases, and industrial safety reforms. Proposes universal healthcare coverage and affordable housing schemes for factory workers.

name: Kavitha Rao
manifesto_summary: Advocates for digital literacy programs, high-speed internet access in rural areas, and e-governance initiatives. Plans startup incubation centers and coding bootcamps for youth.

name: Arun Mehta
manifesto_summary: Proposes comprehensive education reform, new school construction, and teacher training programs. Promises free textbooks and mid-day meal expansion.

name: Fatima Sheikh
manifesto_summary: Focuses on women's empowerment, self-help group expansion, and gender-based violence prevention. Plans to establish women's business centers and skill development workshops.

name: Bala Krishnan
manifesto_summary: Prioritizes healthcare infrastructure, new primary health centers, and ambulance services. Proposes free medical camps and subsidized medicines for elderly citizens.

name: Nandini Das
manifesto_summary: Advocates for transparent governance through blockchain-based public records, RTI automation, and citizen feedback portals. Plans digital ID verification for all government services.
